info.title: Complete Working Time Management API
info.description: Comprehensive API documentation for Working Time Management System with 146 endpoints. Includes offline sync, refresh tokens, tenant isolation, rate limiting, and RLS.

post.description: Authenticate user with email and password, returns JWT token

get.description: Get employee's overtime summary. Calculates overtime based on time_entries where daily work exceeds standard hours (default 8 hours from company settings).

parameters.description: Search by employee name, action, or keyword

grouped_by_date.description: Activities grouped by date labels (Today, Yesterday, or YYYY-MM-DD)

get.description: Get admin notifications with Figma-style category filters (All, Request, Timesheets, Employees, System) and sort by Latest/Oldest. Returns pending leave requests, correction requests, late clock-ins, long hours alerts, new employees, employee status changes, and system alerts.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Filter by Figma tab category. Maps to notification types internally.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by specific notification type (overrides category if set)

parameters.name: employee_id
parameters.description: Filter notifications related to a specific employee

category_counts.description: Counts per Figma tab for badge display

message.example: John Doe requested vacation from 20-Feb to 25-Feb 2026

post.description: Pause the currently running timer. Send body `{}` to toggle, or `{"action":"pause"}` to explicitly pause. Returns updated timer status.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing authentication token

post.description: Resume a paused timer. Ends the active break and resumes work tracking.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing authentication token

post.description: Stop the active timer immediately. No request body required. Automatically closes any open break, calculates final work duration, and saves the session. Use this for a simple stop without offline sync.

get.summary: Get timer history and total work hours

post.description: Start a break session. This will pause the active timer and store the current work duration. Break time will not be counted in work duration.

break_type.description: Break type name from break_types table. Either break_type or break_type_id is required.

break_type_id.description: Break type ID referencing break_types table. Either break_type or break_type_id is required.

post.description: End the current break session. This will resume the timer and add break duration to total_paused_time. Work duration will continue from where it was paused.

post.description: Employee submits a time correction request for clock-in/out modifications. Use GET /api/correction-types to see available correction types and their required fields.

correction_type_id.description: Correction type ID - use GET /api/correction-types to see available types

correction_data.description: Correction data - fields depend on correction_type_id. See examples below for each type.

new_break_duration.description: New break duration in minutes - Type 6 (required)

comment.example: I was in a morning meeting

value.comment: Forgot to clock in - was in morning meeting

Type 2 - Add Missing Work Entry.summary: Add missing work entry - requires start_time, end_time

value.comment: Forgot to track entire work day

Type 4 - Wrong Clock-In Time.summary: Fix wrong clock-in time - requires new_clock_in_time

Type 5 - Wrong Clock-Out Time.summary: Fix wrong clock-out time - requires new_clock_out_time

value.comment: Worked overtime but recorded wrong time

Type 6 - Wrong Break Duration.summary: Fix wrong break duration - requires new_break_duration

401.description: Unauthorized

get.description: Get list of correction requests submitted by the logged-in employee

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing authentication token

get.description: Retrieve all active correction types. Available to all authenticated users.

description.example: Request to add missing clock-in entry

post.description: Admin creates a new correction type with optional custom fields. Only Admin or Manager role can access this endpoint.

description.example: Request to add a missing clock-in entry

custom_fields.description: Array of custom fields for this correction type

value.name: Missing Clock In
value.description: Request to add a missing clock-in entry

value.name: Wrong Clock Out Time
value.description: Request to correct wrong clock-out time

value.name: Add Missing Work Entry
value.description: Add a complete missing work day entry

400.description: Validation error - missing name or invalid custom_fields

403.description: Access denied - Admin or Manager role required

get.description: Admin endpoint to view all employee correction requests with filtering

get.description: Get complete correction request details for the admin modal/form. Returns employee info, current values, corrected values, and comments.

200.description: Correction request approved and applied successfully

message.example: Correction request approved and applied successfully

example: Time entry has been updated in database
Change is reflected in time tracking reports

get.description: Retrieve overtime data for all employees. Overtime is calculated on a WEEKLY basis - overtime only counts after the weekly hours limit (e.g. 40h/week) is exceeded. An employee can work 12h one day and 4h another, overtime only applies when the entire week exceeds the weekly target.
Retrieve detailed overtime data for a specific employee with weekly breakdown and daily details. Overtime is calculated on a WEEKLY basis - only hours exceeding the weekly target count as overtime.
Admin or Manager can view leave balances of ALL employees in their tenant. Returns each employee with their leave type balances (allocated, used, pending, available days).

403.description: Forbidden - Only admins and managers can view leave balances

put.description: Admin or Manager can adjust an employee's leave balance (add or reduce days). Supports adjusting total allocated days or used days.

adjustment_amount.description: Amount to adjust (positive or negative). Days to add or subtract.

403.description: Forbidden - Only admins and managers can adjust leave balances

get.description: Admin or Manager can view an employee's leave balance details including all leave types, allocated days, used days, pending days, and available days.

403.description: Forbidden - Only admins and managers can view leave balances

500.description: Failed to fetch employee leave balance

post.description: Get a new access token using a valid refresh token. Use this when the access token (24h) has expired but the refresh token (30 days) is still valid. This enables offline-first apps to silently re-authenticate without requiring the user to login again.

refreshToken.description: The refresh token received during login

401.description: Refresh token expired - user must login again

post.description: Sync multiple time entries recorded offline in IndexedDB to the server. Supports up to 50 entries per request. Duplicate entries (same clock_in time) are automatically detected and skipped. Each entry can include breaks. Use source 'PWA_OFFLINE' to mark offline-recorded entries.

entries.description: Array of time entries to sync

work_duration_seconds.description: Total work time in seconds (excluding breaks)

breaks.description: Breaks taken during this work period

break_type_id.description: Break type ID from break_types table

message.example: Sync complete: 3 synced, 1 duplicates skipped, 0 failed

400.description: Bad request - entries array required, max 50 entries

401.description: Unauthorized

get.description: Retrieve cross-tenant violation logs. Only accessible by admins.

403.description: Only admins can view security logs

get.description: Returns work history grouped by day for a given week, with time segments (Work, Lunch Break, Personal Break etc). Matches the Figma Work History screen showing daily cards with segments and a weekly total header.

parameters.name: weekStart
parameters.description: Monday of the week (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to current week.

401.description: Unauthorized

get.description: Returns detailed work day view with all time segments, project, location, and notes. Matches the Figma Work day detail screen.

note.example: Retrieving a package from the front door

401.description: Unauthorized

get.description: Returns daily work totals for an entire month with a monthly summary.
